---
name: Good first issue
about: Define a small contributor-friendly task
title: "Good first issue: "
labels: good first issue
assignees: ""
---

## Task

Describe the small change to make.

## Contribution type

Choose one:

- docs improvements
- example explanations
- small tests
- telemetry docs
- benchmark docs
- CLI help wording

## Files or area

List the likely files or area to inspect.

## Expected outcome

Describe what should be true after the change.

## Out of scope

List anything the contributor should not change.

## Verification

Suggested commands:

```bash
./scripts/release_smoke.sh
python3 -m pytest -q
```
